scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(control_id AS NVARCHAR))         AS control_id,
    TRIM(ci_beneficiaria)                       AS ci_beneficiaria,
    TRIM(CAST(establecimiento_id AS NVARCHAR)) AS establecimiento_id,
    TRIM(CAST(nro_control AS NVARCHAR))        AS nro_control,
    TRIM(fecha_control)                        AS fecha_control,
    TRIM(CAST(semana_gestacion AS NVARCHAR))   AS semana_gestacion,
    TRIM(CAST(peso_madre_kg AS NVARCHAR))      AS peso_madre_kg,
    TRIM(presion_arterial)                     AS presion_arterial
FROM bronze.sup_controles',
source1 derive(control_id = iif(isNull(control_id) || trim(control_id) == '' || isError(toInteger(trim(control_id))), -1, toInteger(trim(control_id))),

semana_gestacion = iif(isNull(semana_gestacion) || trim(semana_gestacion) == '' || upper(trim(semana_gestacion)) == 'NULL', toInteger(toString(null())), toInteger(regexReplace(trim(semana_gestacion), '[^0-9]', '')))) ~> derivedColumn1

fecha_control = iif(isNull(fecha_control) || trim(fecha_control) == '' || upper(trim(fecha_control)) == 'NULL' || upper(trim(fecha_control)) == 'N/D', toDate('1900-01-01'), coalesce(toDate(trim(fecha_control), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), toDate(trim(fecha_control), 'dd/MM/yyyy'), toDate(trim(fecha_control), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), toDate(trim(fecha_control), 'dd-MM-yyyy'), toDate(trim(fecha_control), 'yyyyMMdd'))),

presion_arterial = iif(isNull(presion_arterial) || trim(presion_arterial) == '' || upper(trim(presion_arterial)) == 'NULL', toString(null()), regexReplace(trim(presion_arterial), '\\s+', ' '))) ~> derivedColumn2
